---
title: "Winter Week 9"
---

## Materials

📕 [Class slides]({{< var winter-week9-class-slides >}})

💭 [In-class Team Reflections]({{< var team-reflections-411A >}})

📖 [Capstone Guidelines]({{< var capstone-guidelines >}})

## Schedule

12:30 - 12:45: Check-in & Upcoming assignments

12:45 - 1:15: Moving through “the groan zone”

1:15 - 1:20: BREAK

1:20 - 2:20: Dedicated work time & meetings with teams

2:20 - 2:30: BREAK

2:30 - 3:25: Dedicated work time & meetings with teams

3:25 - 3:30: Team Reflection



## Upcoming Capstone Deadlines
![](/411a_winter/images/411a_deadlines5.png)

## To do by next week

### 1. 🌱 Complete Personal Reflection 2

**Due when?** Submit by next class {{< var winter-w5-class-date >}}.

**How to submit:** Upload the two documents **as PDFs** to [this Box folder]({{< var reflection-2-box-folder-411A >}}). Make sure you use the following file name:

`Firstname_Lastname_411A_CapstoneReflection2.pdf`

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

Please complete your the following document:

- [[TEMPLATE] Personal Reflection 2 – 411A]({{< var personal-reflection-2-411A >}})


Detailed instructions are included in the template.

This is an individual assignment. Each person is responsible for submitting their own reflection and submitting it to the Box folder.

**If you would like to set up a meeting with me (Carmen) to chat about anything, please send me a Slack message and we can find a time that works!**

</details>

<br>

### 2. 📝 Update DIP

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

Once you have discussed the feedback from faculty reviews with your team and advisor:

- start working on updating your DIP draft
- contact advisors, reviewers, or clients for clarification and share suggestions. Take the initiative suggesting solutions or approaches and update the document as needed. 
- remember to always do your research and discuss with your team first! 

</details>
